news.summary: Since the launch of Operation Epic Fury, American forces in the U.S. Central Command area of operations crippled Iran's military and its ability to project power, according to War Department leaders.

news.headline: ‘China is gaining from what the US is doing in Iran’
news.summary: Geopolitical analyst Steve Okun says says China is benefiting from the war on Iran.

news.headline: Border Patrol chief Mike Banks resigns in latest Trump immigration shakeup
news.summary: The US Department of Homeland Security has seen several high-profile departures, including Todd Lyons and Kristi Noem.

news.headline: Five Italians die during cave dive in Maldives
news.summary: Italy says the incident happened at a depth of 50m. Maldivian rescuers have so far found one body.

news.headline: China restores US beef trade amid Trump-Xi summit, alarming Brazilian exporters
news.summary:
Brazil’s government expressed concern over China’s renewal of US beef import licences, warning the move could reshape competition in the country’s largest meat export market.

news.headline: Cuba runs out of fuel, diesel amid US blockade
news.summary: Cuba has run out of fuel and diesel, as the US blockade plunges the island deeper into an energy crisis.
